steps.t: Gladion is at his farm in northern Lamedon. Speak with Gladion about the help he needs on his farm.
Gladion's farm is in northern Lamedon. Repair damaged furniture at Gladion's farm.
Gladion is at his farm in northern Lamedon. Speak with Gladion about the help he needs on his farm.
Weeds and stones can be found on Gladion's family's farmland. Pick weeds and stones from Gladion's farmland.
Gladion is at his farm in northern Lamedon. You should return to Gladion.
